grant_type.description: Grant type. Use authorization_code initially or refresh_token to renew.

client_id.description: Client identifier from the platform app UI.

client_secret.description: Client secret from the platform app UI.

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI. Omit for the refresh_token flow.

code.description: One-time-use authorization code. Omit for the refresh_token flow.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token. Omit for the initial authorization_code request.
